entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Please continue with phases 1 by 1 ensuring the entire model loading regardless of the hotpatches or model loading style we use is able to use this as well so everything can be used together, nothing is to not be useable because something is made. Everything in the IDE must get along and work together!'
